title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Triticum aestivum, also known as wheat, essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains compounds such as ferulic acid, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and pain in affected joints. It also has a cooling effect on the skin, which can help to reduce swelling and ease discomfort. Additionally, the oil's antispasmodic properties can help to relax muscles and improve circulation, further alleviating symptoms of knee swelling....
